description.line1: We are an organization that discovers and develops apps that don't exist in the world.
description.line2: Finding infinite ideas from the universe,
description.line3: We aim to create something that doesn't exist yet.

hero.title: Movit
hero.subtitle: Exploration-Based Map App
hero.description: An innovative mobile application that lets you explore the real world and create your own personal map. Using GPS, you illuminate dark areas on the map and record where you've been on your adventures.

exploration.title: Exploration-Based Map Creation
exploration.description: Using GPS, only the places you actually visit are revealed on the map. Create your own unique exploration map.

tracking.title: Real-Time Location Tracking
tracking.description: Precise GPS location tracking unlocks explored areas in real-time. Every step you take is recorded.

privacy.title: Complete Privacy Protection
privacy.description: All data is stored only on your device. No personal information is stored on company servers.

record.title: Personal Exploration Records
record.description: Detailed records of explored distance, time, and newly discovered areas with comprehensive statistics.

download.title: Install Now
download.description: Install Movit now on Android and iOS to start your exploration!

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.line2: Purpleship aims to create services that break existing frameworks.
vision.line3: By implementing apps that only existed in imagination,
vision.line4: Our goal is to provide new experiences.

join.title: Join Us
join.line2: Contact us if you want to explore the unknown universe together.
join.line3: We welcome those who are passionate about discovering new worlds.

hero.title: WorldCanvas
hero.subtitle: Collaborative Canvas
hero.description: Stamp pixels on a shared canvas with people around the world—and finish an artwork together.

collab.title: Real-time collaboration
collab.description: Work together on the same canvas at the same time, with instant updates.

palette.title: Palette & pixels
palette.description: Pick colors, place pixels, and fill a massive canvas with the community.

fast.title: Fast controls
fast.description: A smooth UI to quickly navigate and work on the area you want.

download.title: Start Now
download.description: WorldCanvas is live. Place your pixels on a canvas shared by people around the world.

hero.title: Stampit
hero.subtitle: Membership Management App
hero.description: A smart mobile application for easily managing prepaid memberships, coupons, and vouchers with limited uses. Manage your complex memberships systematically in one place and never miss tracking your remaining uses.

register.title: Register & Manage Memberships
register.description: Easily register and manage prepaid memberships, vouchers, and coupons in one place.

check.title: Usage Tracking
check.description: Simply check off each visit to record usage and see your remaining count in real-time.

remaining.title: Check Remaining Uses
remaining.description: View remaining uses for each membership at a glance, so you never get confused.

integration.title: Unified Management
integration.description: Manage various types of memberships and vouchers conveniently in one integrated app.

expiry.title: Expiry Notifications
expiry.description: Receive alerts as expiration dates approach, so you never miss using your memberships.

history.title: Usage History
history.description: Check records of when you used which membership and analyze your usage patterns.

download.title: Install Now
download.description: Install Stampit on Android and iOS today to start managing your memberships smarter!

privacyPage.title: Purpleship Privacy Policy
privacyPage.subtitle: Privacy policy regarding the collection, use, and management of personal information for Purpleship services.

section1.title: 1. Scope and Basic Principles
section1.p1: This policy applies to Purpleship (hereinafter "Company") and all services operated by the Company (e.g., Stampit, Movit, Qnote, WorldCanvas, etc.).
section1.p2: The Company collects only the minimum personal information necessary to provide services. Additional requirements specific to each service are separately stated in the "Service-Specific Notices" section.

section2.title: 2. Information Collected and Purpose of Use (General)
section2.intro: The Company collects only the minimum information necessary for service provision and customer support.
section2.li1: Website usage: Access logs, browser/OS information, service usage history through cookies and similar technologies (for statistics and service improvement)
section2.li2: Customer inquiry processing: Name, email, and inquiry content received through inquiry channels (email, etc.)
section2.li3: Technical logs: Error logs, device information (model, OS version, etc.) for stability analysis

analytics.title: 2.1 Web/App Analytics Tools
analytics.p1: We may collect anonymized usage statistics using analytics tools such as Google Analytics. We apply IP anonymization and pseudonymization and do not directly identify individuals.

section3.title: 3. Retention and Use Period of Personal Information
section3.li1: Data is retained only for the minimum period required by law or internal policy and is promptly destroyed thereafter.
section3.li2: Access logs: Retained for 3 months in accordance with the Communications Privacy Protection Act and then automatically destroyed.
section3.li3: Customer inquiry records: Retained for 3 years after resolution for dispute preparation and then destroyed.
section3.li4: Account and service data: Deleted without delay upon purpose fulfillment or account termination.

section4.title: 4. Third-Party Provision and International Transfer
section4.p1: In principle, the Company does not provide users' personal information to third parties. However, it may be provided exceptionally in the following cases:
section4.li1: When the user has given explicit prior consent
section4.li2: When there is a legal basis or a lawful request from investigative authorities

section5.title: 5. Outsourcing of Personal Information Processing
section5.p1: We may outsource work to external parties to maintain service quality, and we impose security, re-outsourcing restrictions, and management/supervision obligations on contractors.
section5.li1: Service usage analysis: Google LLC (Google Analytics)
section5.li2: User-selected backup/sync: Apple iCloud Drive, Google Drive, etc.

section6.title: 6. User Rights and How to Exercise Them
section6.p1: Users may exercise the following rights at any time, and the Company will take action without delay.
section6.li1: Withdrawal of consent: You can change or withdraw permissions such as location and notifications through service or device settings at any time.
section6.li2: Request for access, correction, deletion, or suspension: You can request from the Company or manage directly through provided screens/settings.
section6.li3: Filing for remedy through personal information protection centers, dispute resolution committees, etc.

section7.title: 7. Security Measures
section7.p1: The Company takes the following measures to ensure the safety of personal information:
section7.li1: Minimizing access rights and managing access records
section7.li2: Encryption and key management for transmission and storage
section7.li3: Regular security patches and vulnerability checks
section7.li4: Training and inspection for personal information handlers

section8.title: 8. Service-Specific Notices
section8.intro: The following provides additional personal information processing details specific to each service.

stampit.title: Stampit (Membership Management)
stampit.summary: An app for managing membership and coupon usage. Data is stored locally on the device by default.
stampit.li1: Information collected: Store/membership name, stamp/visit records, notification settings
stampit.li2: Storage location: Stored locally on the user's device and not transmitted to Company servers.
stampit.li3: Backup/Sync: If selected by the user, backed up in file format to personal iCloud/Google Drive.

movit.title: Movit (Movement Records)
movit.summary: Manages movement records and favorites. Default storage location is the user's device.
movit.li1: Information collected: Movement routes, location/traffic information (when enabled by user), favorite places
movit.li2: Storage location: Stored locally on the device by default and not transmitted to Company servers.
movit.li3: Optional permissions: Location (including background), notification permissions may be used for movement recording and alerts.

qnote.title: Qnote (Notes/Checklists)
qnote.summary: Note/checklist data is stored locally on the device by default.
qnote.li1: Information collected: Notes, checklists, tags, attachments created by the user
qnote.li2: Storage location: Stored locally on the device and not transmitted to Company servers.
qnote.li3: Backup/Sync: If selected by the user, saved to personal cloud or exported as files.

worldcanvas.title: WorldCanvas (Collaborative Canvas)
worldcanvas.summary: A Google login-based collaborative canvas service that collects and stores minimal information for account identification and synchronization.
worldcanvas.li1: Registration/Authentication: Uses Google OAuth login. Google account identifier (ID) and email are stored in the database for account creation and login identification purposes.
worldcanvas.li2: Service data: Canvases, boards, comments, and attachments created/uploaded by users are stored on Company servers (database) for synchronization and recovery.
worldcanvas.li3: Deletion and retention: Account information and service data are deleted without delay upon account deletion or service withdrawal.

section9.title: 9. Privacy Officer
section9.report: Privacy violation reports: Available through the Personal Information Protection Commission (privacy.go.kr) and other relevant agencies.

section10.title: 10. Privacy Policy Changes and Notices
section10.p1: When laws, service content, or internal policies change, we will notify you of the changes 7 days before implementation through website notice or in-service notification.

termsPage.title: Purpleship Terms & Conditions
termsPage.subtitle: These terms govern the use of the Purpleship website and related services.

section2.title: 2. Scope
section2.p1: These terms apply to the Purpleship website and related services. If service-specific terms (e.g., payments/virtual currency) exist, those terms may take precedence.

section3.title: 3. User Responsibilities
section3.li1: You must comply with applicable laws and these terms.
section3.li2: You must not harm the security or stability of the service (unauthorized access, reverse engineering, abuse, etc.).

section4.title: 4. Intellectual Property
section4.p1: Rights to the website, content, and software belong to Purpleship or the rightful owners.

section5.title: 5. Disclaimer and Limitation of Liability
section5.p1: To the extent permitted by law, we may limit liability for indirect or consequential damages. The service may be provided “as is”.

section6.title: 6. Changes to These Terms
section6.p1: We may revise these terms due to legal or service changes and will provide reasonable prior notice for material updates.

section7.title: 7. Paid Services and Payment
section7.p1: This section sets forth the basic principles that apply commonly to paid services provided by Purpleship.
section7.li1: Payments are processed through trusted third-party payment service providers.
section7.li2: For refund policies, please refer to the separate Refund Policy page.
section7.li3: Specific purchase terms, virtual currency, and provision details for each service are governed by that service's purchase terms, which take precedence over these terms.

worldcanvas.title: WorldCanvas
worldcanvas.desc: Detailed terms for purchasing paid products and virtual currency (Purple) in WorldCanvas.

refundPage.title: Purpleship Refund Policy
refundPage.subtitle: This policy describes refunds/withdrawal rules for paid items and virtual currency (e.g., Purple).

section1.title: 1. Scope
section1.p1: This policy applies to all paid services provided by Purpleship, including WorldCanvas. All payments are processed by Paddle.com as the Merchant of Record, ensuring secure payment processing and consumer protection.

section2.title: 2. 14-Day Refund Guarantee
section2.highlight: You can request a refund within 14 days from the date of purchase without giving any reason.
section2.p1: The refund period expires 14 days after the payment completion date. To meet the cancellation deadline, it is sufficient to send your refund request before the 14-day period expires.
section2.p2: This refund guarantee is for consumer rights protection and applies to initial purchases.

section3.title: 3. Additional Refund Cases
section3.intro: Beyond the 14-day guarantee, refunds may also be granted in the following cases:
section3.li1: Non-delivery or mis-delivery due to our fault
section3.li2: Valid reasons such as duplicate charges or payment errors
section3.li3: When refunds are required by applicable law

section4.title: 4. Refund Limitations After 14 Days
section4.li1: After the 14-day period, if virtual currency (Purple) has already been used, the refund may exclude the consumed portion.
section4.li2: Digital content/virtual currency may be made available immediately, and additional restrictions may apply to the extent permitted by law.

section5.title: 5. How to Request a Refund
section5.intro: To request a refund, please use one of the following methods:
section5.li1: Paddle Customer Support: Request a refund directly at paddle.net
section5.li2: Email: Contact captain@purpleship.io with your purchase details (receipt/payment info)
section5.p1: For immediate processing, please provide the email address used for purchase and payment information when requesting a refund.
section5.p2: We will review and respond within a reasonable time. Refund processing time may vary by payment method.

section6.title: 6. Service-Specific Refund Policies
section6.intro: Different refund policies may apply depending on the service.

worldcanvas.title: WorldCanvas
worldcanvas.desc: Additional details about WorldCanvas purchases and Paddle payment processing.

worldcanvasTermsPage.title: WorldCanvas Purchase Terms
worldcanvasTermsPage.subtitle: This section sets forth additional terms for purchasing and using paid products and virtual currency (Purple) in WorldCanvas.

section1.title: 1. Definitions
section1.d1: "Paid Products" means digital content, permissions, or virtual currency provided through payment.
section1.d2: "Purple" refers to virtual currency (points/credits) usable within WorldCanvas services, which cannot be exchanged for cash.
section1.d3: "Consumption" means using Purple to purchase functions/items or increase usage limits.

section2.title: 2. Purple Usage
section2.p1: Users can purchase Purple to use features within WorldCanvas. Specific uses are displayed in the service interface.
section2.li2: Example: Increasing the "pixel placement limit" for bulk pixel placement
section2.li3: Example: Other paid items/features (may be added in the future)

section3.title: 3. Payment and Delivery
section3.p1: Prices, contents, payment methods, and billing times are shown during the purchase process. Purple or permissions are provided immediately (or within a reasonable time) after payment.
section3.li1: Payments may be processed through third-party payment service providers.
section3.li2: Purchase history and payment details can be verified in the service or payment receipt.
section3.li3: For detailed pricing information, please refer to the pricing page.

section4.title: 4. Withdrawal (Refunds) and Exceptions
section4.p1: Digital content/virtual currency may be available for use immediately upon provision, and withdrawal may be restricted within the scope permitted by law. However, refunds or compensation may be provided in the following cases:
section4.li1: Cases where there is a company fault (non-delivery, incorrect delivery, etc.)
section4.li2: Cases with legitimate reasons (payment errors, duplicate payments, etc.)
section4.li4: If Purple has already been consumed, processing may exclude the consumed portion (within the scope not restricted by law).
section4.li5: For detailed refund policies, please refer to the refund policy page.

section5.title: 5. Minor Payments
section5.p1: Minors making payments may require legal guardian consent, and cancellation (refund) requests may be possible according to law.

section6.title: 6. Usage Restrictions and Recovery
section6.p1: If fraudulent payments, hacking/abuse, or terms violations are confirmed, we may recover granted Purple/permissions or restrict account usage according to applicable laws and service policies.

worldcanvasRefundPage.title: WorldCanvas Refund Policy
worldcanvasRefundPage.subtitle: Refund information for Paddle payment system

section1.title: 1. Payment Processing
section1.p1: All payments for WorldCanvas are processed by Paddle.com as the Merchant of Record. Paddle is an authorized payment service provider that handles payments, tax processing, and refunds.
section1.p2: Paddle's payment terms apply to purchases, and receipts and payment inquiries are processed through Paddle.

section2.title: 2. 14-Day Refund Guarantee
section2.highlight: You can request a refund within 14 days from the date of purchase without giving any reason.
section2.p1: The refund period expires 14 days after the payment completion date. To meet the cancellation deadline, it is sufficient to send your refund request before the 14-day period expires.
section2.p2: This refund guarantee is for consumer rights protection and applies to initial purchases.

section3.title: 3. How to Request a Refund
section3.intro: To request a refund, please use one of the following methods:
section3.li1: Paddle Customer Support: Request a refund directly at paddle.net
section3.li2: Email: Contact captain@purpleship.io with your purchase details (receipt/payment info)
section3.p1: For immediate processing, please provide the email address used for purchase and payment information when requesting a refund.

section4.title: 4. Refund Restrictions After 14 Days
section4.li1: After the 14-day period, if virtual currency (Purple) has already been used, refunds may be processed excluding the used portion.
section4.li2: Refund processing time may vary by payment method. (Card payments: up to 120 days, PayPal: up to 179 days)
section4.li3: Refunds may be denied in cases of fraudulent payments, abuse, or terms violations.

section5.title: 5. Contact
section5.p1: For additional inquiries regarding refunds and payments, please contact us at:
